task_completion.description: Open the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image in ImageJ
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ImageJ application open with an image window titled 'blobs.gif' or 'Blobs (25K)' displaying black irregular shapes on a white background.

task_completion.description: Filter and analyze the small particle population (60-350 pixels)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Analyze Particles' dialog with 'Size' set to '60-350', or a 'Results' table window showing 'Area' measurements with approximately 25 rows.

task_completion.description: Save the small particles statistics to small_particles.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file manager, or terminal window showing 'small_particles.csv' located in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Filter and analyze the large particle population (>350 pixels)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Analyze Particles' dialog with 'Size' set to '350-Infinity' (or similar), or a 'Results' table window showing 'Area' measurements with approximately 32 rows.

task_completion.description: Save the large particles statistics to large_particles.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file manager, or terminal window showing 'large_particles.csv' located in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a classification map with Small particles colored BLUE and Large particles colored GREEN
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image window displaying the segmented blobs where the smaller blobs are filled or outlined in BLUE, and the larger blobs are filled or outlined in GREEN.

task_completion.description: Save the classification map as classification_map.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file manager, or terminal window showing 'classification_map.png' located in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used ImageJ to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the ImageJ GUI, menus, or ImageJ macro editor being used, rather than a Python script bypassing the application entirely.

integrity.description: Verify the classification map is genuinely derived from the blobs image
integrity.visual_evidence: The colored map should perfectly match the shapes and positions of the original 'blobs.gif' image, not just be a generic drawing or solid color block.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV files contain actual ImageJ measurement data
integrity.visual_evidence: The Results windows or saved CSV contents (if visible) should show realistic floating-point or integer area measurements, not manually typed placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Blobs (25K) image contains 57 valid particles after filtering noise (<60 pixels). There are exactly 25 'Small' particles (60-350 pixels) and 32 'Large' particles (>350 pixels). The VLM should look for these approximate row counts (25 and 32) in the Results tables for the respective CSV files. The classification map must visually match the original blobs image shapes, with the smaller blobs colored BLUE and larger ones colored GREEN.
